app_identity.icon_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" role="img" aria-label="FlowDesk">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d97706"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fbbf24"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="circle"><circle cx="64" cy="64" r="64"/></clipPath>
  </defs>
  <g clip-path="url(#circle)">
    <rect width="128" height="128" fill="url(#g)"/>
    <g transform="translate(0,2)"><text x="64" y="64" dominant-baseline="central" text-anchor="middle" font-family="system-ui,Segoe UI,sans-serif" font-size="38" font-weight="700" fill="#ffffff">FL</text></g>
  </g>
</svg>
app_identity.short_description: # Build execution plan (compressed) Purpose: premium restaurant inventory management app for a small restaurant Users: Defined in prompt audience signals Style: modern First-pass tier: standard ## Core screens - with a dashboard - inventory

metadata.initial_prompt: Create a premium restaurant inventory management app for a small restaurant. It should help the owner track ingredients, stock levels, low-stock alerts, supplier orders, daily usage, expiry dates, and simple cost insights. Make the UI modern, clean, and beautiful, with a dashboard, inventory page, suppliers page, alerts page, and settings page.

risks: Backend requires user Supabase configuration for live data
exclusions: This first version focuses on the main app experience.
You can add payments, mobile app packaging, and advanced integrations later from your app workspace.
emptyStates: No records yet — add your first item
approved_blueprint.designSystem: Neutral palette, Inter-like typography, subtle shadows, no heavy gradients.
approved_blueprint.styleInfluence: Minimal: Minimal SaaS: generous whitespace, 1px borders, restrained color, clear hierarchy.
approved_blueprint.designDirection: Minimal SaaS: generous whitespace, 1px borders, restrained color, clear hierarchy.
approved_blueprint.oneSentencePitch: Create a premium restaurant inventory management app for a small restaurant. It should help the owner track ingredients, stock levels, low-stock alerts, supplier orders, daily usage, expiry dates, and simple cost insight
acceptanceCriteria: All routes in routeMap render without placeholder labels
Loading, empty, and error states implemented
Preview uses realistic sample content until live data is connected
backendRequirements: Enable RLS on all user-owned tables
